sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!'), (2, 'ClickHouse database'), (3, 'Fuzz testing with overlay function.');
SELECT overlay(text, 'SQL', 8) AS new_text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT overlay(overlay(text, 'fuzzy', 1), 'test', 8, 4) AS nested_replacement FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE '%testing%';
SELECT id, overlay(text, 'OVERLAY', -7) AS modified_text FROM test_strings WHERE text IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id UInt32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, now()), (2, now() - INTERVAL 2 DAY), (3, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'));
SELECT event_id, event_date + INTERVAL 5 HOUR AS updated_event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > now() - INTERVAL 3 DAY;
SELECT event_id, overlay(toString(event_date), '2023', 1) AS modified_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < now() - INTERVAL 1 WEEK;
SELECT overlay('Testing boundary cases: ', toString(event_id), 1) AS boundary_test, event_date + INTERVAL toUInt32(event_id) DAY FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_id HAVING event_id > 0;
SELECT id, overlay(text, toString(event_id), 1, 3) AS ref_based_mod FROM test_strings, test_dates WHERE id = 3 AND event_id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT overlay(text, 'example', length(text)) AS modified_text FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE modified_text LIKE '%example%';
SELECT id, overlay(text, CAST(event_date AS String), -10) AS text_with_date FROM test_strings JOIN test_dates ON id = 3 WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_strings AS SELECT overlay(text, 'temporary', 1) AS temp_text FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM temp_strings HAVING temp_text IS NOT NULL;
SELECT overlay('Edge case test: ', '', 1) AS empty_string_test UNION ALL SELECT overlay('DateTime input: ', toString(now()), 1) AS datetime_test FROM test_dates;
